## Purpose

Describe the problem and the focused change.

## Validation

- [ ] `dart format lib test`
- [ ] `flutter analyze`
- [ ] `flutter test`
- [ ] Windows release build completed
- [ ] No secrets, real customer data or production databases included
- [ ] Database changes are backward compatible or include a migration

## User-visible impact

Describe screens, workflows, reports or stored data affected by this change.
